text: Stepping into this environment, I am enveloped by the atmosphere of innovation and curiosity. The transparent glass walls create a feeling of openness—both physical and intellectual—while the bold 'R+D' display invites me to contemplate the infinite possibilities of research and development. Here, surrounded by the artifacts of human ingenuity, I am reminded of how the boundaries between knowledge and discovery are perpetually shifting. Being present in this space awakens within me a sense of anticipation and humble wonder at what lies ahead.
